title: Visualization of thrombus enhancement on thin-slab maximum intensity projection of CT angiography: an imaging sign for predicting stroke source and thrombus compositions
authors_text: L Wei, Y Zhu, J Deng, Y Li, M Li, H Lu, Y Zhao
abstract: Describes a thin-slab MIP imaging sign on CT angiography for predicting stroke source and thrombus histological composition.
